column1: # cdss_bench seed manifest.  One row per data type.
#   filename  plain file to place under seeds/data/
#   size_mib  synthetic-fallback size in MiB (used ONLY if no real seed found)
#   sha256    sha256 of the PLAIN seed; verified after fetch/decompress ("-"=skip)
#   source    where to get the REAL seed:
# The four rows below are the REAL rev4 base corpora (100 MB each), committed
# zstd-compressed under seeds/real/ so every clone/instance is apple-to-apple.
# To use different data: replace the bundled .zst (or point source at S3/https)
